seo.title: WuWa Rotation Planner {'|'} Visual Online Rotation Editor
seo.description: Block-based drag-and-drop editing, custom templates, team saves, handy shortcuts, one-click image export. Easy to pick up, full-featured, highly flexible. Available in EN / JA / KO / ZH.

sidebar.noCharacterLabel: No character selected; custom templates unavailable
sidebar.emptyHint: Drag blocks back from the timeline to save templates

swimlane.switchMessage: All blocks of this character will be cleared. Continue?
swimlane.deselectMessage: All blocks of this character will be cleared. Continue?

export.title: Export Rotation Images
export.resolutionHint: Higher scale is sharper but larger

settings.heading: Settings
settings.animationsHint: Turn off to reduce motion and improve performance
settings.rememberExportHint: Keep last filename and merge mode
settings.clearDataHint: Reset general blocks and export settings, and delete custom templates and saved teams (cannot be undone)
settings.clearConfirmMessage: This will reset general blocks and export settings to their defaults, and delete all custom templates and saved teams (cannot be undone). Continue?

teams.title: Team Manager
teams.nameTaken: This name is already in use
teams.overwriteMessage: The current board will overwrite "{name}". Continue?
teams.deleteCurrentMessage: The current team save will be deleted. Continue? (Board content is kept)

help.title: Help
help.navBlocks: Select blocks left/right one at a time
help.navLanes: Cycle lane selection up/down (Space appends a block at the end)
help.selectAll: Select all blocks in the current rotation
help.duplicateRight: Duplicate selected blocks to the right
help.insertBlank: Insert a blank block after the selection

tour.step1Desc: Click an avatar to switch characters; use the button in the bottom-right corner to remove a character.
tour.step3Desc: Click the add button to create a block at the end of the character axis, or press <kbd>Space</kbd> to add one after the selected block; double-click or press <kbd>Enter</kbd> to re-edit the block text.
tour.step4Desc: Select multiple blocks using <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+click or by drawing a selection box.
tour.step5Desc: Delete the selected block using the <kbd>Delete</kbd> / <kbd>Backspace</kbd> key or by dragging.
tour.step6Desc: <kbd>A</kbd> / <kbd>D</kbd> (or <kbd>←</kbd> / <kbd>→</kbd>) selects the previous/next block; <kbd>W</kbd> / <kbd>S</kbd> (or <kbd>↑</kbd> / <kbd>↓</kbd>) switches to the previous/next character's lane; can be used in conjunction with related shortcut keys.
tour.step7Desc: Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>X</kbd> / <kbd>C</kbd> / <kbd>V</kbd> / <kbd>D</kbd> to cut, copy, paste, and copy to the right; Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>Z</kbd> / <kbd>Y</kbd> to undo and redo.
tour.step8Desc: Drag and drop to reorder the character swimlanes.
tour.step9Desc: Add several rotations to the same team.
tour.stepTeamsDesc: Save or load team rotation setups.
tour.stepExportDesc: Save the team rotation as an image.
tour.stepHelpDesc: Click here to look up shortcuts or replay the tutorial.

toast.templatesAllExist: All selected blocks already exist in the library
